# Mohd Azim — Java Backend Engineer

> Java Backend Engineer based in Delhi, India. Specializing in Spring Boot, Microservices, Apache Kafka, and AI-augmented backend systems. Currently working at Paytm (One97 Communications).

## About

Mohd Azim is a Software Engineer with 3+ years of professional experience building scalable, high-throughput backend systems for enterprise clients. He has shipped production systems serving 27M+ end users at Paytm, including a subscription and billing platform running on Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, Redis, MySQL, and AWS.

He led a zero-downtime Java 1.6 → Java 21 modernization of a 15-year-old enterprise codebase, and built internal AI tools using Spring AI and LangChain4j. Before Paytm, he worked at Publicis Sapient building enterprise commodity-trading solutions on Openlink Endur for global clients.

## Primary Skills

- **Programming Languages**: Java (95%), Python (85%), SQL (90%), JavaScript, TypeScript
- **Backend Frameworks**: Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, REST APIs, Microservices
- **Messaging & Data**: Apache Kafka, Redis, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS (EC2, S3), GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, Docker, SonarQube, Grafana
- **AI Engineering**: Spring AI, LangChain4j, RAG Pipelines, LLM Integration

## Key Projects

1. **High-Scale Subscription & Billing Platform** (Paytm, Production) — Distributed Spring Boot backend for subscription lifecycle and multi-channel billing serving 27M+ users.
2. **Operational Incident Intelligence Service** (Paytm, Internal) — Spring AI + LangChain4j RAG retrieval service reducing MTTR on billing-critical incidents.
3. **Agentic Java Backend Service** (Personal) — Spring Boot 3 GenAI service with tool-calling, RAG, and agentic task-execution patterns.

## Blog Posts / Technical Writing

- "Understanding Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in Spring Boot"
- "Architecting Event-Driven Systems with Apache Kafka"
- "Modern Backend Modernization: Migrating from Java 8 to Java 21"
- "Distributed Caching Strategies: Redis vs. Database Queries"
- "Securing Microservices: JWT, Spring Security, and Rate Limiting"
- "Implementing SAGA Pattern for Distributed Transaction Management"
